creator: mindflux98@gmail.com
text:
twhttpd is marked broken, however it is now fetchable again as of Aug 22, 2006.

Fix: 

-BROKEN=                Unfetchable
-
 USE_GMAKE=     yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
 CONFIGURE_ENV= LIBS="-lmd"--HVC6AVAzqtdpFIKE5ecNnoowcgFrZv7Zp8rlqHOCdczGPKsw
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN /usr/ports/www/twhttpd/Makefile twhttpd/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/twhttpd/Makefile     Thu Aug 17 16:02:39 2006
+++ twhttpd/Makefile    Tue Aug 22 19:12:33 2006
@@ -14,8 +14,6 @@
 MAINTAINER=    ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=       Secure HTTP Proxy
